query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_barra_superior
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.lead_id = l.id
WHERE f.corretor_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%andrew%' LIMIT 1)
  AND f.status = 'ativo'
  AND l.status = 'em_atendimento'
  AND f.proxima_tentativa <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY);
